label: Strategy Classification
description: Classification of a strategic approach or positioning.

label: Viability Prediction
description: Analyst prediction about future viability or success.

label: Actual Outcome
description: Verified historical outcome of a prediction or situation.

label: Technology Assessment
description: Evaluation of a technology capability, quality, or status.

label: Framework Factor
description: Factor within an analytical framework or model.

label: Expert Opinion
description: Analyst or expert judgment without formal data backing.

label: Network Computing
description: IBM term for distributed computing over networks; the 1997 successor to client-server paradigm.

label: Visual Programming Environment
description: Point-and-click/drag-drop application development environment; predecessor to modern visual IDEs.

label: Third-Generation Language
description: Traditional procedural programming languages: COBOL, FORTRAN, C, BASIC.
